Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 5}All right. Next, let's go over a useful approach for defeating enemies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}Most enemies have an elemental affinity that they have low resistance to. Targeting weaknesses is one of the best ways to deal damage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}Not only that, it can also knock enemies down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 5}Knocking down an enemy creates an opening, letting you continue your offense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 3}Weaknesses, huh? Got it! I'll show you how it's done...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 2}Just point it to my head... then pull the trigger...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 0 3}Whoa! You're not so bad yourself, Yuka-tan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 12 0 5}Well done. You struck the enemy's weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_732_0_13
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 13 0 5}Keep that up and finish off the rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_732_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enemies can have weaknesses to certain affinities. Hitting an enemy's weakness will knock them down, allowing you to act again.[n]{f 1 1}
